---
title: "Data"
date: "27 June 2024"
sgtemplates:
  footer:
    link:
    - href: accessibility.html
      text: Accessibility
    - href: contact.html
      text: Contact
  header:
    site_branding: "Scottish agriculture greenhouse gas emissions and nitrogen use:
      2022-23"
    toc:
      sticky: no
  navigation:
    breadcrumb_trail:
    - href: index.html
      text: Home
    - text: Data
    toc:
      sticky: no
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

<b>An official statistics in development publication for Scotland </b>

<b>Publication date: 27 June 2024</b>

<a href = download/ScottishAgricultureGHGEmissionsAndNUseDataTables.xlsx>Download</a> the Scottish agriculture greenhouse gas emissions and nitrogen use: 2022-23 data tables.
